ques: Search a one-way filght from Dublin To Athens Greece for 1 Adult that leaves on December 30 and analyse the price graph for the next 2 months.
answer: Searched one-way Dublin→Athens, 1 adult, departing Wed Dec 30, 2026 (from €118).
